title: Login with valid credentials
preconditions: The app is launched and the login screen is displayed
test_steps: Open the app | Click on the 'Log In' button | Enter a valid username in the 'airG Username' field | Enter a valid password in the 'Password' field | Click on the 'Log In' button
expected_result: The user is successfully logged in and redirected to the home screen

title: Login with invalid credentials
preconditions: The app is launched and the login screen is displayed
test_steps: Open the app | Click on the 'Log In' button | Enter an invalid username in the 'airG Username' field | Enter a valid password in the 'Password' field | Click on the 'Log In' button
expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating invalid credentials
